metadata.note: Rankings derived from ACS 5-year estimates, DOLA population projections, HUD CHAS cost-burden data, LEHD LODES commuting flows, and AMI gap modeling. Overall need score weights: 50% unit gap (30% AMI), 30% cost-burden rate, 20% in-commuter pressure. Generated by scripts/hna/build_ranking_index.py.

metrics.label: Overall Housing Need Score
metrics.description: Composite need index (0–100) combining unit gap at 30% AMI (50%), cost-burden rate (30%), and in-commuter pressure (20%). Higher scores indicate greater overall housing need.

metrics.label: Housing Units Needed (30% AMI)
metrics.description: Deficit of affordable housing units at 30% AMI

metrics.label: % Rent-Burdened Households
metrics.description: Percentage of renter households paying ≥30% of income on housing

metrics.label: Units Needed at 30% AMI
metrics.description: Unit deficit at 30% of Area Median Income

metrics.label: Units Needed at 50% AMI
metrics.description: Unit deficit at 50% of Area Median Income

metrics.label: Units Needed at 60% AMI
metrics.description: Unit deficit at 60% of Area Median Income (primary LIHTC tier)

metrics.label: % Burdened at ≤30% AMI
metrics.description: CHAS: percentage of renter households at or below 30% AMI that are cost-burdened

metrics.label: % Burdened at 31–50% AMI
metrics.description: CHAS: percentage of renter households at 31–50% AMI that are cost-burdened

metrics.label: % Burdened at 51–80% AMI
metrics.description: CHAS: percentage of renter households at 51–80% AMI that are cost-burdened

metrics.label: In-Commuters (LEHD)
metrics.description: Workers employed in this county who live in another county (LEHD LODES OD)

metrics.label: In-Commute Ratio
metrics.description: Share of local jobs filled by workers living outside the county (%)

metrics.label: Population (20-yr Projection)
metrics.description: DOLA-projected population approximately 20 years from base year

metrics.label: Median Household Income
metrics.description: ACS median household income (most recent vintage)

metrics.label: % Renter-Occupied
metrics.description: Percentage of occupied housing units that are renter-occupied
